title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Costco India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Costco India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!
